query:
SELECT 
  'Total com dteTermination NOT NULL' as tipo, COUNT(*) as quantidade
FROM properfyProperties 
WHERE dteTermination IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Total com dteTermination NULL', COUNT(*) FROM properfyProperties 
WHERE dteTermination IS NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Total geral', COUNT(*) FROM properfyProperties
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Com dteTermination em Janeiro 2026', COUNT(*) FROM properfyProperties 
WHERE dteTermination IS NOT NULL
AND dteTermination >= '2026-01-01' AND dteTermination <= '2026-01-31'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Com dteTermination em Fevereiro 2026', COUNT(*) FROM properfyProperties 
WHERE dteTermination IS NOT NULL
AND dteTermination >= '2026-02-01' AND dteTermination <= '2026-02-28'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Com dteTermination em Março 2026', COUNT(*) FROM properfyProperties 
WHERE dteTermination IS NOT NULL
AND dteTermination >= '2026-03-01' AND dteTermination <= '2026-03-31'
